---
title: "Problem Set 3: Prediction and Regularization"
author: "Mizuki Yashiro"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
Github Link: https://github.com/mizukiyashiro/gov51-ps3.git

# 1. Setup and Data Exploration

## 1.1: 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(knitr)

compas <- read_csv("data/compas_clean.csv")
```
